cn: 少年合唱团下个月将在我们镇上演出。
explanation: 一般将来时 will 转换：疑问句 will 提前，否定句 will not（won't）。

answers: The Greenwood Boys Club will give a concert in our town next month.
The boys' choir will give a concert in our town next month.
Will the Greenwood Boys Club give a concert in our town next month?
Will the boys' choir give a concert in our town next month?
The Greenwood Boys Club will not give a concert in our town next month.
The Greenwood Boys Club won't give a concert in our town next month.
The boys' choir will not give a concert in our town next month.
The boys' choir won't give a concert in our town next month.

steps.prompt: 对「in our town」提问（问地点）
answers: Where will the Greenwood Boys Club give a concert next month?
Where will the boys' choir give a concert next month?
When will the Greenwood Boys Club give a concert in our town?
When will the boys' choir give a concert in our town?

cn: 我到的时候，他已经读完那本书了。
explanation: 过去完成时 had 提前构成疑问句；表示"已经…"用 had finished / had already finished。

answers: He had already finished reading the book when I arrived.
He had finished reading the book when I arrived.
Had he already finished reading the book when you arrived?
Had he finished reading the book when you arrived?
He had not finished reading the book when I arrived.
He hadn't finished reading the book when I arrived.
He had not already finished reading the book when I arrived.
He hadn't already finished reading the book when I arrived.

steps.prompt: 对「reading the book」提问（问"完成了什么"）
answers: What had he finished when you arrived?
What had he already finished when you arrived?

explanation: must 表必要：疑问句 Must you…?；mustn't 表禁止，与"不必"语义不同，本题否定用 need not 作参考答法可不练否定。

answers: You must book your tickets in advance.
You must buy your tickets in advance.
Must you book your tickets in advance?
Must you buy your tickets in advance?

steps.prompt: 对「your tickets」提问（问"必须订什么"）
answers: What must you book in advance?
What must you buy in advance?

steps.prompt: 对「in advance」提问（问"必须何时订"）
answers: When must you book your tickets?
When must you buy your tickets?

cn: 他喜欢独自坐在小船里。
explanation: enjoy 后接动名词 doing；一般现在时借助 does 转换疑问/否定。

answers: He enjoys sitting in a boat alone.
He enjoys sitting alone in a boat.
Does he enjoy sitting in a boat alone?
Does he enjoy sitting alone in a boat?
He does not enjoy sitting in a boat alone.
He doesn't enjoy sitting in a boat alone.
He does not enjoy sitting alone in a boat.
He doesn't enjoy sitting alone in a boat.

steps.prompt: 对「sitting in a boat alone」提问（问"喜欢做什么"）
answers: What does he enjoy doing?
What does he enjoy?

explanation: 现在完成时 has 提前构成疑问句；just 常与现在完成时连用。

answers: He has just bought a new house.
He's just bought a new house.
Has he just bought a new house?
Has he bought a new house?
He has not just bought a new house.
He hasn't just bought a new house.
He has not bought a new house yet.
He hasn't bought a new house yet.

steps.prompt: 对「a new house」提问（问"买了什么"）
answers: What has he just bought?
What has he bought?

cn: 他们去年建了这栋房子。
explanation: 主动转被动：宾语作主语 + was/were + 过去分词；施动者不重要时可省略 by them。

answers: They built this house last year.
They built the house last year.
This house was built last year.
The house was built last year.
This house was built by them last year.
The house was built by them last year.

steps.prompt: 把被动句改为一般疑问句
answers: Was this house built last year?
Was the house built last year?

steps.prompt: 对「last year」提问（基于被动句，问时间）
answers: When was this house built?
When was the house built?
